text: I'm an immigrant, but I don't like other
immigrants. I just need to be clear
about this.
No, it's like that for all of us. We
don't like the Kabans who come after us.
Like back in the day, the Irish didn't
like the Italians. The Italians didn't
like the Puerto Ricans. THE PUERTO
RICANS DIDN'T LIKE THE DOMINICANS. But
the Dominicans could play baseball, so
they were fine.
And now the Indians and the Chinese
can't stand each other because somebody
decided we all have to check the Asian
box for college applications.
So all our kids are fighting for the
same 15 spots at Princeton.
Meanwhile, those poor Sri Lankans,
Filipinos, Bhutanese, they're like,
"What did we do to get stuck in this
mess?" And seriously, when you see me,
do you think Asian? Do you think I bet
she knows where the best dim sum is?
No. You see me and you think I bet her
uncle owns a Motel 6.
AND HE DOES. TWO OF THEM.
